note: Open Dependabot alerts. Pass = Dependabot is monitoring dependencies (endpoint responds) and no open alert is high or critical severity. Needs a PAT with Dependabot-alerts read (GITHUB_TOKEN cannot read them); reads it from KSI_DEPENDABOT_PAT if set, else falls back to GH_TOKEN and surfaces as Pending. A disabled/unreadable feature never becomes a false pass.
